Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The standard P2P process flow typically is 1 Create Purchase Requisition 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order 4 Receive Goods 5 Vendor Invoice Received 6 Match Invoice to PO 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1001 This follows the standard flow perfectly This is the reference normal case No anomalies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 sequence Create Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Vendor Invoice Received Release Payment Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: PO issued BEFORE requisition approval invoice before goods receipt Release Payment released BEFORE approval BEFORE goods receipt BEFORE matching Approval AFTER PO invoice and payment Goods received AFTER payment Matching AFTER payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is highly anomalous classic fraud pattern or serious control violation paying before receiving goods no matching before payment retroactive approval

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 sequence Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Issue Purchase Order Release Payment Vendor Invoice Received Receive Goods Match Invoice to PO Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment released before invoice received paying without an invoice Payment released before goods receipt paying for unreceived goods Matching performed after payment control is retroactive defeats its purpose

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: This could indicate prepayment advance payment scenarios but typically those would be flagged without that context it is anomalous

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 sequence Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Receive Goods Issue Purchase Order Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Goods received before PO issued receiving goods without a purchase order at time of receipt

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This could be a retroactive PO or after the fact PO situation which is a known maverick buying uncontrolled purchasing pattern

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The rest of the flow invoice match pay is in order though the ordering anomaly is the key issue

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The approval control is bypassed nullified segregation of duties and budget controls undermined invoice received before goods and paying it immediately is a fraud risk paying phantom invoices

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The three way match is a key internal control to prevent overpayment fraud performing it after payment renders it detective at best rather than preventive

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Why problematic Without a PO the organization has no committed terms no budget check no vendor confirmation goods receipt cannot be verified against an order risk of unauthorized purchases duplicate orders invoice fraud after the fact PO indicates maverick spend bypassing procurement controls

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Possible benign explanations data quality issues advance payments emergency purchases but they warrant investigation
